action.reasoning: Observation: v5 heuristic gives low safe_steps (~38-53 avg, max~81/500), 0.0 success, low found_rate~0.1, avg_dist~4.5-5m, occasional collisions/early terminations; config confirmed success needs >=500 steps in [1,2)m with |angle|<0.2618rad (~15deg). Test script works for fast iteration. Analysis: myopic P-controller loses dynamic random-walking humanoid (oracle changes targets); no obstacle awareness causes collisions/stuck states; literature map+SPF heuristic achieves ~0.5 follow-rate but complex to integrate in remaining budget (needs world coords, dynamic goal projection, discrete-to-vel mapping). Root cause is insufficient seeking speed, oscillation, and no avoidance. Decision: implement v6 heuristic in test+predict with reduced angular gain (-3.0), depth-based front obstacle avoidance (slow+turn on min_depth<1.2m using head_depth), stronger far-seeking (linear=1.0 if dist>3.5 and clear), refined in-range stabilize (low linear=0.15 when detector+good angle), backup logic; expand test diagnostics (detector usage, per-epi details, max_safe); complete non-truncated predict.py with identical policy + full JSON contract + output dir creation; run test_full_episode.py first for quick feedback on improvement before submit_eval.
